caption: A group of people are gathered in a room with wood-paneled walls and horizontal blinds. A man stands at a wooden podium on the left, while another man in a white shirt and a black embroidered vest plays an acoustic guitar. An audience, consisting of several people with various hairstyles and clothing, including a woman in a blue and red patterned shawl and another in a yellow shirt, sits facing the performers. The logo "ORCA" appears in white text on a black rectangular background in the lower right area of the scene. As the sequence progresses, the camera angle shifts from a wide shot showing the podium and the guitarist to a closer medium shot focusing on the guitarist. The man with the guitar continues to play and sing, while the audience members remain seated and attentive.
